_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: We chose sNF96.2 as a previous TaqMan assay showed that the sNF96.2 cell line had low miR-29c expression, a finding consistent with low miR-29c expression in MPNST.
details: Low miR-29c expression, consistent with low miR-29c expression in MPNST
